title: cephalomanes atrovirens f. acrosorum
intro: Cephalomanes atrovirens f. acrosorum, also known as the Acrosorum species of the Cephalomanes atrovirens fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cephalomanes atrovirens f. acrosorum include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
